column1: # ESP-IDF partition table for UMSH ESP32 firmware (shared by every board
# in this workspace). Pass with `espflash flash --partition-table`; the
# Makefile targets do this for you.
# The `umsh` row is what `umsh_bsp_esp32::flash_store` looks up by label at
# boot to derive its `sequential-storage` range — it is never hardcoded in

column2: so this file is the single source of truth for the region.

column1: # Sized for the 4 MB the bootloader assumes (the Heltec V3 physically has
# 8 MB; claiming the rest is a separate
# partition gets ~2.94 MB so the NCP firmware has room — the BLE spike

column2: and the espflash default table only offered 1 MB.
